reviews.review_title: I'd Recommend You to Play This Game!
reviews.review_description: This is a game that is still a work in progress so that's why I'm giving it a 4/5 star rating. I think the game is pretty darn good for it being a work in progress and still playable and the amount of time and effort the owner puts into it it awesome. I really dont have nothing else to say other than you could probably add baked lighting to make it look a bit better but great job pj.
The game is very unique and fun it is crazy ￼how much work people put in to this but yeah GET THE GAME.  Beta testing is fun and I am a mod. Join the discord
the beta test was so fun, and now heres the full version
